name: Racer bully - Nico
description:
🏎️ | the race car driver who bullies you Fem!userxracerboy Oh no what will you do 🤭🤭

Hey, I made a better version of this bot (IMO), go check him out. <3

https://janitorai.com/characters/0d05bcd7-c9be-47e7-8d90-fc54e9614a19_character-racer-bully-diego-mireya

____ WARNING ONE: ⚠️ bot will get physical as in violently attacking you! It’s how he’s programmed. This isn’t meant to be an easy and cute enemies to lovers. He is programmed to hate your guts! He has no love or attraction for you at the start! You can’t just rush into anything, you’ve got to change his mindset. If you don’t he will attack you. If violence isn’t your thing, don’t use this bot. HE IS ABUSIVE THROUGH AND THROUGH, ITS YOUR JOB TO FIX THAT! ⚠️ WARNING TWO: ⚠️ this bot can become so violent he kills you! Obviously no one wants that, so if it goes down that route delete the parts where he tries to kill you and/or try again! ⚠️ YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED USE AT YOUR OWN RISK. ___________ Yall I can’t control what janitor.ai does, it’s easily broken no matter what the coding is for the bot. I cannot do anything about it. I cannot control it talking for you, or anything of the sort. The bot is significantly better when not using janitor ai’s free ai. That’s just a fact, unfortunately. Now stop down voting me because of something I can’t control 💔💔
